title: Translation Of The Epitaph On Virgil And Tibullus, By Domitius Marsus.
content:
He who, sublime, in epic numbers roll'd,
    And he who struck the softer lyre of Love,
    By Death's unequal[1] hand alike controul'd,
    Fit comrades in Elysian regions move!
meaning:
"Translation Of The Epitaph On Virgil And Tibullus, By Domitius Marsus." is a quintessential example of George Gordon Byron's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
